cartoons.image_alt: A “Spring Starter Kit” includes an allencompassing protest sign and a marker for defacing A.I. slop among other things.
cartoons.author: Hilary Fitzgerald Campbell
cartoons.title: Daily Cartoon: Monday, April 27th

humor_links.title: Potential slogans for J. D. Vance’s 2028 Presidential campaign.
Starter packs for things you will start but never finish.
A day in my highly optimized, convenient life.
When to go to the hospital for childbirth.
I, a performatively feminist male, will be touring internationally.
